final.sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade, 4326)) AS geom_geojson FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE 'Lillestrøm'

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [statistiskrutenett1km]
SELECT id, ssbid1000m, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(geom, 4326)) AS geom_geojson FROM statistiskrutenett1km WHERE ST_Intersects(geom, ST_Transform(ST_GeomFromGeoJSON('{"type":"Polygon","coordinates":[[[10.5,59.5],[11.5,59.5],[11.5,60.5],[10.5,60.5],[10.5,59.5]]]}'), 25833))
